name: orca-fleet
description: 10 outcome-named autonomous fleets for the Orca runtime. Each mission is one outcome with its own state machine and a SHA-bound evidence definition of done: ship-it, clean-sweep, harden-it, speed-it, modernize-it, prove-it, deflake-it, review-it, map-it, root-cause. Missions compose best-of-breed worker recipes (mattpocock, gstack, addyosmani) over Orca — one router per worker. No vendor-named fleets. MIT.
